title: zeltnera venusta
intro: Zeltnera venusta, also known as Western Buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Zeltnera venusta is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Zeltnera venusta is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
